penalties.description: No actual task performance was observed. The video contains only instructional slides and brief demonstration clips without a complete ligating loop task execution.

reasoning: Claude correctly identified this as an educational presentation rather than a scoreable task performance. GPT-4o's detection of task phases and scoring appears to be based on brief instructional clips that are not a complete, timed task attempt. The video lacks the fundamental requirements for FLS scoring: a clear start point, complete task execution, and measurable completion.
